docs/commands.md:list:184cff66666bbc1247.source: 已有历史的 work Session 不能直接切到 chat；需要先 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，再 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/commands.md:list:184cff66666bbc1247.translation: A work Session with existing history cannot be switched directly to chat; you need to __ELBOT_CODE_0__ first, and then __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/commands.md:list:618c24a7386c369400.source: CLI 作为本地高权限入口，可以跨平台查看 Session；非 CLI 平台默认只查看当前平台和作用域下的 Session。
docs/commands.md:list:618c24a7386c369400.translation: CLI serves as a local high-privilege entry point and can view Sessions across platforms; non-CLI platforms view Sessions under the current platform and scope by default.

docs/commands.md:list:6474db69037797ece1.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 可以直接恢复最近更新的非当前 Session，无需先执行裸 __ELBOT_CODE_1__；编号按更新时间排列，不受置顶影响，翻页时编号连续。
docs/commands.md:list:6474db69037797ece1.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can directly restore the most recently updated Session other than the current one without first executing a bare __ELBOT_CODE_1__; indices are sorted by update time, are not affected by pinning, and remain continuous when paging.

docs/commands.md:list:67a80dc961c39a456c.source: 规则 Hook 直接使用配置里的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__；内置 Hook 使用 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 名称，例如 __ELBOT_CODE_2__。
docs/commands.md:list:67a80dc961c39a456c.translation: Rule Hooks directly use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ from the configuration; built-in Hooks use __ELBOT_CODE_1__ names, for example __ELBOT_CODE_2__.

docs/commands.md:list:86f4b0d40783395da1.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 从审计日志的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 事件聚合 token 用量，按模型/天/会话分组统计 prompt、completion、total、cache 和耗时。
docs/commands.md:list:86f4b0d40783395da1.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ aggregates token usage from __ELBOT_CODE_1__ events in the audit log, calculating prompt, completion, total, cache, and duration grouped by model/day/Session.

docs/commands.md:list:9bb8cb699b4337c2b6.source: 压缩会保留历史用户原话、忽略工具返回值，成功后创建并切换到独立的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ Session；旧 Session 不修改。
docs/commands.md:list:9bb8cb699b4337c2b6.translation: Compaction preserves the original user history and ignores tool return values; upon success, it creates and switches to an independent __ELBOT_CODE_0__ Session, while the old Session remains unmodified.

docs/commands.md:list:a0b5430c1b57bff3b1.source: 自动压缩由 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 控制。
docs/commands.md:list:a0b5430c1b57bff3b1.translation: Automatic compaction is controlled by __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/commands.md:list:a56a0a6ac063927892.source: 例如 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 会先切换到 chat 模式，再把“随便聊聊”作为同一条用户消息发给模型；若模式切换被拒绝，消息不会发送。
docs/commands.md:list:a56a0a6ac063927892.translation: For example, __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will first switch to chat mode, then send "Just chatting" as the same user message to the model; if the mode switch is rejected, the message will not be sent.

docs/commands.md:list:a9cf3d8b3aa0479861.source: 删除是永久操作，需要显式 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/commands.md:list:a9cf3d8b3aa0479861.translation: Deletion is a permanent operation and requires explicit __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/commands.md:list:b697cfc2231f030876.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 模式不注入工具，适合闲聊、陪伴和低成本问答。
docs/commands.md:list:b697cfc2231f030876.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ mode does not inject tools, making it suitable for casual chat, companionship, and low-cost Q&A.

docs/commands.md:list:cb73e0f2b874464a2f.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 模式启用工具发现和工具调用。
docs/commands.md:list:cb73e0f2b874464a2f.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ mode enables tool discovery and tool calling.

docs/commands.md:list:f09b27469f6c5b3a4a.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 会重新读取 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 和各插件 __ELBOT_CODE_2__，并重建 Hook 注册、替换受影响的持久进程。
docs/commands.md:list:f09b27469f6c5b3a4a.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will reread __ELBOT_CODE_1__ and the __ELBOT_CODE_2__ of each plugin, rebuild Hook registrations, and replace affected persistent processes.

docs/commands.md:list:f275ad5728d0764f38.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 会显示在列表和详情里；规则细节只在详情里显示。
docs/commands.md:list:f275ad5728d0764f38.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will be displayed in the list and details; rule details are only displayed in the details.

docs/commands.md:list:f8edef1dd92025bd8f.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 展示的编号可被 __ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__、__ELBOT_CODE_3__ 等 Session 操作命令复用。
docs/commands.md:list:f8edef1dd92025bd8f.translation: The indices displayed by __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can be reused by Session operation commands such as __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, and __ELBOT_CODE_3__.

docs/commands.md:paragraph:1632ad5994e50.source: LLM 在 work 模式下可以通过 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 按需发现工具详情。
docs/commands.md:paragraph:1632ad5994e50.translation: In work mode, the LLM can discover tool details on demand via __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/commands.md:paragraph:1b0f8169cc843.source: 具体提示以运行时输出为准。
docs/commands.md:paragraph:1b0f8169cc843.translation: Specific prompts are subject to the runtime output.

docs/commands.md:paragraph:475e75cb3d56e.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 会先完整扫描并验证候选 Skill，再一次性替换当前集合。
docs/commands.md:paragraph:475e75cb3d56e.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will first fully scan and verify the candidate Skills, and then replace the current set all at once.

docs/commands.md:paragraph:4e18ac914a4e3.source: 聊天中也可以用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__（简写 __ELBOT_CODE_1__）预载工具，或用 __ELBOT_CODE_2__（简写 __ELBOT_CODE_3__）把 Skill 文档加入本轮消息并预载对应运行 wrapper。
docs/commands.md:paragraph:4e18ac914a4e3.translation: In a chat, you can also use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ (shorthand __ELBOT_CODE_1__) to preload tools, or use __ELBOT_CODE_2__ (shorthand __ELBOT_CODE_3__) to add Skill documentation to the current round of messages and preload the corresponding runtime wrapper.

docs/commands.md:paragraph:6d44113da741d.source: 冒号也可以写成中文全角冒号 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/commands.md:paragraph:6d44113da741d.translation: The colon can also be written as a full-width Chinese colon __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/commands.md:paragraph:7b5dd9c95b68c.source: 模型参数可以是列表编号、模型名或 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/commands.md:paragraph:7b5dd9c95b68c.translation: Model parameters can be a list number, model name, or __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/commands.md:paragraph:970c185f8fd4d.source: 若存在重名 Skill、与内置工具重名或读取失败，reload 会返回错误并保留原有工具集合。
docs/commands.md:paragraph:970c185f8fd4d.translation: If there are duplicate Skill names, names that conflict with built-in tools, or if reading fails, reload will return an error and preserve the original tool set.

docs/commands.md:paragraph:b14afe6a70f51.source: 当工具调用触发高风险确认时，Agent 会提示可用确认命令，例如：
docs/commands.md:paragraph:b14afe6a70f51.translation: When a tool call triggers a high-risk confirmation, the Agent will prompt the available confirmation commands, for example:

docs/commands.md:paragraph:efbbd4966c0c3.source: ElBot 的 slash 命令由 Agent Core 统一处理，CLI、QQ、后续平台共享同一套语义。
docs/commands.md:paragraph:efbbd4966c0c3.translation: ElBot's slash commands are handled uniformly by Agent Core; CLI, QQ, and subsequent platforms share the same semantics.

docs/commands.md:paragraph:f0ee4b20f8360.source: Fork 会保留原会话，并从指定 assistant 消息位置创建新的上下文分支。
docs/commands.md:paragraph:f0ee4b20f8360.translation: Fork preserves the original Session and creates a new context branch from the specified assistant message position.

docs/commands.md:paragraph:fd46fc8739d3b.source: 默认命令前缀是 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，可在 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 的 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 中配置。
docs/commands.md:paragraph:fd46fc8739d3b.translation: The default command prefix is __ELBOT_CODE_0__, which can be configured in __ELBOT_CODE_2__ of __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/commands.md:table:0471409581d7be81d.source: 按外部事件 ID 过滤。

docs/commands.md:table:08155296f98306ae8.translation: Create and switch to a new Session.

docs/commands.md:table:0ca36ceb7e35d7dbf.translation: Only view entries before a certain time.

docs/commands.md:table:15738bd60ce6597c4.source: 查看当前 Session 状态。

docs/commands.md:table:16c88a2fd09b95832.source: 查看最近 n 天，默认 1。
docs/commands.md:table:16c88a2fd09b95832.translation: View the last n days, default is 1.

docs/commands.md:table:1b9b7ec543db3d789.source: 切换到 chat 模式，或创建新的 chat Session；提供消息时会切换后立即发送。
docs/commands.md:table:1b9b7ec543db3d789.translation: Switch to chat mode, or create a new chat Session; if a message is provided, it will be sent immediately after switching.

docs/commands.md:table:26048c0dbde8ca8a2.source: 切换 Session 自动命名模型。

docs/commands.md:table:2615ae021ab7e211d.source: 查看待确认工具调用详情；支持工具自定义纯文本详情，未自定义时显示格式化后的参数。
docs/commands.md:table:2615ae021ab7e211d.translation: View details of tool calls awaiting confirmation; supports custom plain-text details for tools, and displays formatted parameters if not customized.

docs/commands.md:table:29759e8cff00540a8.source: 汇总审计日志中的 token 消耗数据。
docs/commands.md:table:29759e8cff00540a8.translation: Summarize token consumption data in the audit log.

docs/commands.md:table:2c095d2b79ab25543.source: 查询 Elnis/Elwisp 事件日志。

docs/commands.md:table:315d4f29d42ddb977.source: 按 Elnis event key 过滤。

docs/commands.md:table:33ca20a4e06855fff.source: 分别筛选用户、助手、工具事件。
docs/commands.md:table:33ca20a4e06855fff.translation: Filter user, assistant, and tool events respectively.

docs/commands.md:table:366c25fdadebbf52d.translation: Only view entries after a certain time, e.g., __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__.

docs/commands.md:table:386b5d9e704201979.source: 删除过期且未归档、未置顶的 Session。
docs/commands.md:table:386b5d9e704201979.translation: Delete expired Sessions that are not archived or pinned.

docs/commands.md:table:44d72185339f8bce0.source: 停止并重新启动一个持久 Hook。
docs/commands.md:table:44d72185339f8bce0.translation: Stop and restart a persistent Hook.

docs/commands.md:table:47784861a54331a69.source: 恢复历史 Session；编号 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 表示最近更新的非当前 Session。
docs/commands.md:table:47784861a54331a69.translation: Restore a historical Session; index __ELBOT_CODE_0__ represents the most recently updated Session other than the current one.

docs/commands.md:table:4b18f0e99fbc129f1.source: 查看某个命令的详细帮助。
docs/commands.md:table:4b18f0e99fbc129f1.translation: View detailed help for a specific command.

docs/commands.md:table:4bd446dad6f63c874.translation: Number of entries to return, default is 5.

docs/commands.md:table:4f5d8f215ee70aac5.source: 按内部 Elnis event ID 过滤。
docs/commands.md:table:4f5d8f215ee70aac5.translation: Filter by internal Elnis event ID.

docs/commands.md:table:53fa3a6b3b254c400.source: 切换到 work 模式，或创建新的 work Session；提供消息时会切换后立即发送。
docs/commands.md:table:53fa3a6b3b254c400.translation: Switch to work mode, or create a new work Session; if a message is provided, it will be sent immediately after switching.

docs/commands.md:table:56375112941485fec.source: 从指定 assistant 消息创建分支 Session。
docs/commands.md:table:56375112941485fec.translation: Create a branched Session from a specified assistant message.

docs/commands.md:table:5c2ee7a4f4437a088.source: 切换 chat 模式模型。

docs/commands.md:table:629a1073c0066a335.source: 停止指定请求；也可使用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 显示的编号；不传参数时停止当前 Session 的请求。
docs/commands.md:table:629a1073c0066a335.translation: Stop a specified request; you can also use the ID displayed by __ELBOT_CODE_0__; if no parameters are passed, stop the requests of the current Session.

docs/commands.md:table:662180bb3357d0b97.source: 查看当前进程中的 active request，包括 turn、LLM、tool、hook 等请求；turn 会显示运行阶段和阶段耗时。
docs/commands.md:table:662180bb3357d0b97.translation: View active requests in the current process, including turn, LLM, tool, and hook requests; turns will display the execution stage and the time spent on each stage.

docs/commands.md:table:6af7f1c01fb399469.source: 按文本、参数、结果或 raw 内容过滤。
docs/commands.md:table:6af7f1c01fb399469.translation: Filter by text, parameters, results, or raw content.

docs/commands.md:table:728eaabcc986c4ad0.source: 切换 Elnis elwisp3 模型槽位。
docs/commands.md:table:728eaabcc986c4ad0.translation: Switch to Elnis elwisp3 model slot.

docs/commands.md:table:76dfbb62693e2c649.source: 切换 work 模式模型。

docs/commands.md:table:7c2a3e53187de152e.source: 置顶 Session，默认当前 Session。
docs/commands.md:table:7c2a3e53187de152e.translation: Pin Session, defaults to the current Session.

docs/commands.md:table:7e01cc256419e48f2.translation: View the list of available commands.

docs/commands.md:table:82e0f62db1cb3e8d9.source: 按 Elwisp 名称过滤，等同于 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/commands.md:table:82e0f62db1cb3e8d9.translation: Filter by Elwisp name, equivalent to __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/commands.md:table:87a813e678b72821f.source: 拒绝当前待确认工具调用。
docs/commands.md:table:87a813e678b72821f.translation: Reject the current pending tool call.

docs/commands.md:table:8c15f471f2ed058be.source: 重读规则和持久 Hook 配置，并重新协调进程生命周期。
docs/commands.md:table:8c15f471f2ed058be.translation: Reread rules and persistent Hook configurations, and re-coordinate the process lifecycle.

docs/commands.md:table:99fcf954149006d2e.source: 切换 Elnis elwisp2 模型槽位。
docs/commands.md:table:99fcf954149006d2e.translation: Switch to Elnis elwisp2 model slot.

docs/commands.md:table:9c8296ef5a7163e24.source: 列出已注册工具和外置 Skill。
docs/commands.md:table:9c8296ef5a7163e24.translation: List registered tools and external Skills.

docs/commands.md:table:afa95af16ab2e4a10.source: 读取最近 n 天日志，默认 1。
docs/commands.md:table:afa95af16ab2e4a10.translation: Read logs from the last n days, default is 1.

docs/commands.md:table:b22d25d651b10d907.source: 删除外置 Skill 及其目录。
docs/commands.md:table:b22d25d651b10d907.translation: Delete external Skills and their directories.

docs/commands.md:table:b6bc6405777523258.source: 取消置顶 Session，默认当前 Session。
docs/commands.md:table:b6bc6405777523258.translation: Unpin Session, defaults to the current Session.

docs/commands.md:table:c361507dc951fd06a.source: 强制刷新模型列表缓存。
docs/commands.md:table:c361507dc951fd06a.translation: Force refresh the model list cache.

docs/commands.md:table:d48d38b3012ec2b0c.source: 查看某个 Hook 的详细配置。
docs/commands.md:table:d48d38b3012ec2b0c.translation: View the detailed configuration of a specific Hook.

docs/commands.md:table:d505c882b0c2631f3.source: 取消归档 Session，默认当前 Session。
docs/commands.md:table:d505c882b0c2631f3.translation: Unarchive Session, defaults to the current Session.

docs/commands.md:table:d9c788e8bb861df5f.source: 列出当前 Session 中可用于 fork 的 assistant message ID。
docs/commands.md:table:d9c788e8bb861df5f.translation: List assistant message IDs available for forking in the current Session.

docs/commands.md:table:e1faa12627e3e71dc.source: 确认当前待确认工具调用。
docs/commands.md:table:e1faa12627e3e71dc.translation: Confirm the current tool call awaiting confirmation.

docs/commands.md:table:e6ec204590c3db969.source: 停止当前进程中的所有 active request。
docs/commands.md:table:e6ec204590c3db969.translation: Stop all active requests in the current process.

docs/commands.md:table:f6eb857febf405197.source: 按 token name 过滤，不包含 token 原文。
docs/commands.md:table:f6eb857febf405197.translation: Filter by token name, excluding the original token text.

docs/commands.md:table:f74053733f24d09d6.source: 切换当前 Session 模式使用的模型。
docs/commands.md:table:f74053733f24d09d6.translation: Switch the model used in the current Session mode.

docs/commands.md:table:f8e111dd81fa09c2c.source: 归档 Session，默认当前 Session。
docs/commands.md:table:f8e111dd81fa09c2c.translation: Archive Session, defaults to the current Session.

docs/commands.md:table:f8facc8e7be39a3d8.source: 手动压缩当前 Session 上下文。
docs/commands.md:table:f8facc8e7be39a3d8.translation: Manually compact the current Session context.

docs/commands.md:table:f9616901b1b52bbb6.source: 切换 Elnis elwisp1 模型槽位。
docs/commands.md:table:f9616901b1b52bbb6.translation: Switch to Elnis elwisp1 model slot.

docs/commands.md:table:fb6b2fa9be44b8de7.source: 重命名当前或指定 Session。
docs/commands.md:table:fb6b2fa9be44b8de7.translation: Rename the current or a specified Session.

docs/commands.md:table:fbadfde16ab096fb7.source: 确认当前批次全部待确认工具。
docs/commands.md:table:fbadfde16ab096fb7.translation: Confirm all pending tools in the current batch.
